theme_strategy.rationale: Nutrition and health platforms benefit from a clean, bright, and hygienic aesthetic. The light theme with warm off-white backgrounds evokes organic health and daylight, contrasting perfectly with the rich, realistic colors of food ingredients.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous, breathable layouts with an asymmetrical bento-box dashboard grid.
spacing_and_layout.container_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for major panels, rounded-xl for inner cards.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #E5E7EB. No heavy box-shadows; subtle layered shadows (shadow-sm) to differentiate overlapping panels.

component_styles.navigation: Transparent background fading into glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) when scrolling. Fixed at the top.
component_styles.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or smooth rounded-lg. Primary buttons use #6FA67A background with white text.

meal_builder.plate_container: Centered ceramic-plate look; food dropped onto an absolute-positioned area.
meal_builder.ingredient_gallery: Horizontal scrolling flex container (gap-4), scrollbar hidden.
